zh.lifeSummary: 當Elise Adeliza de Lascelles於大約1059年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普時，她的父親Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire39歲，母親Hugolina de Gernon34歲。她和Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1090年在英國英格蘭享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elise Adeliza de Lascelles于大约1059年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利費艾坎普时，她的父亲Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire39岁，母亲Hugolina de Gernon34岁。她和Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1090年在英国英格兰享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Elise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: short form of   Elisabeth .  The name was introduced into the English-speaking world (where it is often written without the accent) in the late 19th century and has become fairly popularity in recent years.

variants.name: Elisa
meanings: short form of   Elisabeth .  The name was introduced into the English-speaking world (where it is often written without the accent) in the late 19th century and has become fairly popularity in recent years.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elise Adeliza de Lascelles was born about 1059, in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire, was 39 and her mother, Hugolina de Gernon, was 34. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. She died about 1090, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elise Adeliza de Lascelles est née environ 1059, à Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Hugolina de Gernon, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. Elle est décédée environ 1090, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elise Adeliza de Lascelles um 1059 in Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire 39 und ihre Mutter Hugolina de Gernon 34. Sie hatte mit Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1090 im Alter von 33 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elise Adeliza de Lascelles è nata il circa 1059 nel Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Hugolina de Gernon, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. Morì circa 1090, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elise Adeliza de Lascellesが約1059年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフeカンップで生まれた時，父Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshireは39歳，母Hugolina de Gernonは34歳であった。彼女はPagan Peverell Lord of Whittingtonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1090年にイギリスイギリスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elise Adeliza de Lascelles(이)가 대략 1059년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 프e캠프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hugolina de Gernon(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1090년 영국 잉글랜드에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elise Adeliza de Lascelles nasceu aproximadamente 1059, em Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Hugolina de Gernon, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1090, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elise Adeliza de Lascelles родилась около 1059 г. в местности фeкамп, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Hugolina de Gernon, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. Она умерла около 1090 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elise Adeliza de Lascelles nació aproximadamente 1059, en Fécamp, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Picot de Lascelles, I, High Sheriff of Cambridgeshire, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Hugolina de Gernon, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Pagan Peverell Lord of Whittington. Murió aproximadamente 1090, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
